name: ERROR MESSAGE
description: A hacked rocket launcher that cannot be obtained normally. It is typically added through save editing or acquired by trade, and it only functions if the required content is installed.
notes: Access is limited to save editors, mods, or trading, and the required content must be present. It is treated as a Torgue launcher but uses a purple Tediore-style skin. Its behavior matches the Ahab, firing explosive harpoons. If spawned with Master Gee, it rolls random parts and a random prefix but always uses a Maliwan barrel. Its damage also scales largely from Master Gee's remaining health, increasing as his health drops.
